definition.name: order_unit_and_archimedean
definition.definition: An element e ∈ V^+ is an order unit if for every v ∈ V there exists n ∈ N such that ne - v ∈ V^+ (i.e. v ≤ ne). The cone V^+ is Archimedean if, whenever ne + v ∈ V^+ for all n ∈ N, it follows that v ∈ V^+. The triple (V, V^+, e) is called an Archimedean order unit space (AOU space).
